message:
Node started: Task: Sarcasm Classification

Problem: Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1). Determine the resulting 3-bit pattern.

Input Data:
[Note: The specific Reddit replies were not provided in the source text. Please classify the three replies provided in the context of this task ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification.]

Required Output Format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <3-bit string>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
